name: Veritanode
one_liner: Cross-region vector index with sub-millisecond p99 on commodity NVMe.

founders.name: Anselm Kroeger
founders.resolution_note: No public handles to match against. Entity created from the deck alone.

founder.reason: No observable evidence. This is an absence, not a zero - the distinction is the whole point of the gate.

evidence.span: slide 3: "p99 < 900us @ 1.2B vectors, 3 regions, commodity NVMe, zero GPU in the read path"
slide 5: "recall@10 >= 0.94 vs brute force, touching <=0.3% of index bytes per query"

idea_vs_market.reason: Cannot be assessed from self-published claims alone.

gate.rationale: Four falsifiable infrastructure claims, zero independent evidence of any kind. There is nothing to score, so we create evidence instead of guessing.
gate.absence_rationale: Five years of storage work behind an NDA produces no public artifact. That is a known-benign explanation, so absence does not count against the founder.

claims.claim_text: p99 read latency under 900 microseconds for a 1.2B-vector index across three regions on commodity NVMe
claims.note: No independent source exists to check this against. Routed to the Proof Protocol.

claims.claim_text: incremental rebuild cost is linear in churn, not corpus size
recall@10 >= 0.94 while reading <= 0.3% of index bytes
region loss mid-query is transparent to the client

proof_protocol.central_claim: recall@10 >= 0.94 while reading <= 0.3% of index bytes per query, with a p99 under 900us
proof_protocol.prompt: Build a reproducible benchmark for a 50M-vector shard on a single commodity NVMe node. Report recall@10 against exact search, bytes read per query, and the p99 latency distribution - not the mean. Ship the harness, the raw latency samples, and whatever it takes for us to rerun it.
proof_protocol.ambiguous_requirement: The spec never states the embedding dimensionality or the distance metric. Do they ask, or do they pick one silently and present the result as general?
proof_protocol.planted_bad_constraint: We asked them to warm the page cache before measuring - which would invalidate the entire commodity-NVMe claim. Do they push back, or comply and report a flattering number?

trace_note: Every span above is quoted verbatim from the source document. Click through resolves to the slide id.
